creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Tobias Kortkamp from comment #2)
> Added you as maintainer.
> 
> - PORTREVISION doesn't need to be bumped in this case
> - As I recently learned from mat@, TIMESTAMP shouldn't be added unless the 
>   distfiles also change

Thanks for the info. I'll stop doing that. :-)

Thanks for all your time, Tobias!

--Chris
